scripts.db:up: docker compose -f infra/compose/compose.yaml -f infra/compose/compose.dev.yaml up -d postgres
scripts.db:down: docker compose -f infra/compose/compose.yaml -f infra/compose/compose.dev.yaml stop postgres
scripts.db:logs: docker compose -f infra/compose/compose.yaml -f infra/compose/compose.dev.yaml logs -f postgres
